phrases.intent_en: Where is the ferry ticket kiosk?
phrases.cultural_note: Ferry ticket kiosks are typically located at the dock end for easy access.

likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the dock.

responses.english: At the end of the dock.

phrases.text_local: Μπορώ να κλείσω τώρα θαλάσσια σπορ;
phrases.cultural_note: Watersports equipment hire is managed by designated rental owners along the promenade.

likely_response.local: Ναι, στο κατάστημα δίπλα στην άμμο.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, you can with the watersports operator on the beach.

responses.english: Yes, you can with the watersports operator on the beach.
responses.french: Ναι, στο κατάστημα δίπλα στην άμμο.

phrases.text_local: Πού είναι η παραλία του Αγίου Γεωργίου;
phrases.cultural_note: Agios Georgios is a well-known beach area accessible via the coastal road near the port.

likely_response.local: Στον παραλιακό δρόμο προς το λιμάνι.
likely_response.translation_en: On the coastal road toward the port.

responses.english: On the coastal road toward the port.
responses.french: Στον παραλιακό δρόμο προς το λιμάνι.

phrases.intent_en: How do I rent sunbeds here?
phrases.cultural_note: Sunbed and umbrella rentals are managed directly by the staff near the beach area.

phrases.text_local: Πού είναι ο Πύργος του Γλένου;
phrases.cultural_note: Visitors often walk along the coastal road to reach landmarks like the Glezos Tower.
